weather.headline: Chance Rain Showers then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
weather.detail: A chance of rain showers between 9am and noon, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. High near 58, with temperatures falling to around 55 in the afternoon. North northwest wind 2 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
